title: polycampium hastatum
intro: Polycampium hastatum, also known as Chinese club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lycopodiophyta class of vascular plants. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polycampium hastatum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
